name: Stickman Street Fighting
description: Stickman!!! Fight through the street levels and defeat the enemy stick fighters! Collect weapons such as melee weapons , machine gun, pistol and saw. No one really knows why the fighting in the street began, but YOU will become the ultimate stickman fighter! - Gamepad , joystick controls support - Offline game , no internet required - Fight through over 100 stickman street locations Music: IoChron - TrAnCeD Mastery
instructions: Arrrow keys to move Space bar to jump Z to punch X to kick C to block
tags: 1 Player, 3D, Fight, Fighting, Stickman, Street Fighting, Unity3D, Violence
